---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.toy_forge_pla_bundle
alias: toy_forge_pla_bundle
purchased_on: 2025-11-12
total_eur: 72
counterparty: Filamenthütte Wien
project: Toy Forge Saturdays
related_entity: Badger
lines:
  - item: PLA spool mixed colors
    quantity: 3
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 72
---
# Family PLA spool bundle

```text
+----------------+---------------------------+
| field          | value                     |
+----------------+---------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                      |
| bill_id        | bill.toy_forge_pla_bundle |
| alias          | toy_forge_pla_bundle      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-11-12                |
| total_eur      | 72                        |
| counterparty   | Filamenthütte Wien        |
| project        | Toy Forge Saturdays       |
| related_entity | Badger                    |
+----------------+---------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                   | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | PLA spool mixed colors | 3   | 24       | 72       |
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                  |     |          | 72       |
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older family-printing consumables that only got sorted once Toy Forge became a named lane.

next_step.current_state: Wrote YAML frontmatter to the first Badger bill successfully. The reactive outbox-writing context appears inapplicable because this was a finance record, not an outbox file. Continue focused OCR writes for remaining Badger bills, preserving bodies exactly.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete inbox file and report completion
next_step.observation: Added YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/purchases/2025_11_12__eur_000072__bill__toy_forge_pla_bundle.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request by OCRing all Badger-related bills into YAML frontmatter and then removing the inbox note. Updated four purchase records: 2025_11_12__eur_000072__bill__toy_forge_pla_bundle.md, 2026_01_04__eur_000080__bill__studio_parts_petg_batch.md, 2026_02_04__eur_000033__bill__studio_parts_nozzle_and_inserts.md, and 2026_03_03__eur_000089__bill__black_library_terrain_spool.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved original note bodies exactly while adding YAML frontmatter, and deleted the inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox note requested OCR for all bills related to Badger. The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/badger.md established the target entity. Searches in 50_finance/purchases found four records whose visible bodies explicitly listed `related_entity | Badger`, and each record contained all required bill-schema fields and line items from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. Those four files were updated in place with YAML frontmatter while preserving the original body, satisfying the OCR and migration workflows.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to four Badger bill files
